description: Named SQL source for descendant components.

sql.description: DuckDB SQL query with {{source_name}} and $param_name placeholders. The result becomes available to descendant SQL widgets as {{name}}.

name.description: Logical source name exposed to descendant SQL widgets via {{name}}.

maxRows.description: Safety limit appended when the SQL has no LIMIT clause. Defaults to 10000.

propsSchema.description: Runs a DuckDB query and exposes its result as a named SQL source to descendant components.
